updateHazardsWithEps

Source: R/doTmleUpdate.R
updateHazardsWithEps.Rd

Illustrative helper function that modifies local hazards based on epsVec. You must define how each eps entry maps to a hazard shift or scale.

Usage

updateHazardsWithEps(
  localEst,
  epsVec,
  Data,
  TargetEvent,
  TargetTime,
  Verbose = FALSE
)

Arguments

localEst

ephemeral copy of the Estimates list

epsVec

numeric vector (length = k)

Data

data.table

TargetEvent

numeric

TargetTime

numeric

Verbose

boolean

Value

The updated localEst (ephemeral)

On this page
